scripts.prebuild: bash scripts/build-md.sh && bash scripts/build-brand-zip.sh && bun run scripts/build-og.ts
scripts.cf:dev: VOCS_SITE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8787 npm run build && wrangler dev --config wrangler.local.jsonc --local
scripts.cf:migrate:local: wrangler d1 migrations apply centaur-docs-community-slack-requests --config wrangler.local.jsonc --local
